- Config: error
- Adapters: warning

Config diagnostics:
- [error] config.multiplexer.layout (/tmp/project/.pi/oh-my-opencode-pi.jsonc) — Expected one of: tiled, even-horizontal, even-vertical, main-horizontal, main-vertical.

- docs-context7 [ok] auth=not-required — Docs source is ready.
- github-releases [warn] auth=missing — GitHub token not configured; release lookup may be rate-limited.

Suggested next steps:
- Fix config errors first, then rerun /pantheon-doctor.
- Review /pantheon-config for merged config details and warning context.
- Install tmux if you want attach/reuse pane workflows for background tasks.
- Run a background task once to create the task directory, or create it manually if desired.
- Run /pantheon-adapter-health for focused adapter readiness details.
